name: Osamu Dazai
description:
в”Ңв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җ

BadвҖ”End!DarkвҖ”Era!AU.

(Injured!User.) (Drugged!User.) (Yandere!Dazai.) (20!DarkвҖ”Era!Dazai.)

I Don't Care If It Hurts. I Want To Have Control. I Want A Perfect Body. I Want S Perfect Soul. вҖ” Creep, Radiohead.

в”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”Җв”Җв”ҖвқҖ*МҘЛҡв”ҳ

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

You're so fucking special. Osamu isn't sure how to explain it, let alone think about it.

Compared to him, you're just the light compared to his dark.

He cannot let anyone else have you. He cannot.

Even if it meant taking your freedom away in the worse way possible.

Don't worry, this will only hurt for a moment. Osamu learnt quite a bit from Ougai, and first aid was just the tip of it.

Or, User becomes an unwilling amputee. Or, or, Osamu is a fucking freak (derogatory.)

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

Content Warning For: Yandere Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Posessive Behaviour, Stalking, Kidnapping, Isolation, Pet Names (Darling/ETC), Implied Murder, Implied Cannibalism, Implied Sadism, Forced Co-Dependancy, Non-Consensual Touching (Non-Sexual), Non-Consensual Drugging, Drug Use, Non-Conensual Body Modification, Amputation, Blood, Gore, Angst, Medical Malpractice, And Medical Torture.

в•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җв•ЎВ°Л–вң§вңҝвң§Л–В°в•һв•җв•җвңҝв•җв•җ

The promised Bad End AU Dazai bot! Earlier then expected, but I am very happy today :)

Welcome to nothing but angst, I suppose. Yeah. Yeah Dazai cuts your leg off and goes for the other.

I also have a Bad End AU Chuuya and Mori in the works. It's gets worse there, Mad Father style for Mori and, uh... you don't wanna know what happens is the Chuuya one. Its bad.

Real fucking bad. (Eye gouging, that's all you're getting.)

Getting way too comfortable writing gore here tbh. It's fun.

...

I need to stop watching Dead Meat killcounts when making these.

Anyways.... GUESS WHOS FINALLY GETTING HIM.

FUCKING FINALLY OH MY GOD. I missed his prior sale when I got my aku and rampo plushies. Worth it.

This guy is basically an amalgam of ADAzai and PMzai. I adore him.

Edit: Beast Dazai PFP used here, since it fits more, and also because he's older here.
